mapper.sql: TOPIC_MEMBER_SEQ /**/ , TOPIC_SEQ /**/ , MEMBER_SEQ /**/ , ROLE_TYPE /**/ , JOIN_DT /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/
mapper.select:
/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontGroupsMapper.selectFrontGroups */ SELECT
FROM TOPIC_MEMBER WHERE TOPIC_MEMBER_SEQ = #{topicMemberSeq} AND USE_YN = TRUE
